name: refine_blade_regent_floor5_history_1781920615
description: Local run-history Regent floor-5 deck experiment: add one RefineBlade to a winning Ascension 10 run.
assumptions: The scenario adds one RefineBlade to the referenced run-history floor-5 deck.
SovereignBlade does not start in the deck; the first Forge play generates it into hand.
Forge realized value is credited back to RefineBlade only when SovereignBlade is played.
Both variants keep Forge fixed at 9; the EV delta isolates +1 next-turn energy in this deck and simulator policy.
